name: happyskills-search
description: HappySkills — Find, recommend, and star skills, browse versions and changelogs, and match a local folder of skills against the catalog. Use when searching for a skill, exploring what is available, starring favorites, picking a version, or checking which local skills exist in HappySkills. Not for installing.

capabilities.summary: search the registry and get project-aware skill recommendations
intents: find a skill for a task
discover a skill to do Y
match a local folder of skills against the catalog
which of my local skills already exist in HappySkills

capabilities.summary: browse a skill's published versions and changelog
intents: list the versions of a skill
what versions of a skill exist
read the release notes for a skill

capabilities.summary: star and unstar skills to manage your favorites
intents: add a skill to my favorites
remove a skill from my favorites

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
